project.name: Alvus Dashboard
project.designRead: Dashboard management console / DevOps admins / dark precision tool / high density / avoid glossy effects and neon
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Vercel-inspired dark precision dashboard: emerald green #10b981 accent, #0a0a0b bg, #111113 surfaces, 1px #1f1f23 borders, Inter + JetBrains Mono, restrained 8px radius, border-led surface layering, high information density

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: dark bg #0a0a0b, surface #111113, border #1f1f23, primary emerald #10b981
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter sans-serif body, JetBrains Mono for data/code
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: tight utility spacing, 1rem card padding, 0.75rem table cell padding
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: border-led cards (1px #1f1f23), no shadow on static surfaces, elevated shadow only for floating layers
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: minimal: border-color transitions on hover, no glow effects

sharedProjectShellContract.description: All 4 pages share identical sidebar (220px left), topbar (56px), background, spacing rhythm, type hierarchy, card radius/shadow model
sharedProjectShellContract.navigationStructure: left sidebar with 4 nav items: 概览, Key 管理, 日志, 设置
sharedProjectShellContract.topbarContents: Alvus logo/name, status indicator (OK/Degraded/Error), last health check time, refresh interval control

pages.title: 概览
pages.visualNorthStar: 打开页面第一眼就知道 Key 池整体健康度
continuityAnchors: JetBrains Mono for all data values
emerald green primary for interactive elements
